nodes.name: 莱特岛
nodes.summary: 莱特岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联11种鸟类，包括Black-faced coucal、Philippine eagle-owl、Pinsker's hawk-eagle等11种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Kitanglad Mountain Range
nodes.summary: Kitanglad Mountain Range是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Mindanao lorikeet、Black-and-cinnamon fantail、Stripe-breasted rhabdornis等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 阿波火山
nodes.summary: 阿波火山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联26种鸟类，包括Everett's scops owl、Pinsker's hawk-eagle、Philippine trogon等26种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Stripe-breasted rhabdornis
nodes.summary: Stripe-breasted rhabdornis（Stripe-breasted rhabdornis，学名 Rhabdornis inornatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is typically found in tropical montane and submontane forest but has been found as low as 230 masl in Leyte

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Mount Apo and Kitanglad Mountain Range but like all areas in the Philippines protection is lax

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Mount Apo and Kitanglad Mountain Range but like all areas in the Philippines protection is lax
